title: stelis alfredii
intro: Stelis alfredii is a type of orchid native to China, also known as the Chinese goldenseal or goldenseal orchid. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Stelis alfredii are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and treat various health conditions.
